headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Discounts
content:
Defy every red light in the iconic Banshee GTS, a sportscar of impressive pedigree that’s on sale for 40% off. Plus, get a range of discounts including:

– LS Tuners Racing Suits — 50% off
– Benny's Conversion Upgrades — 50% off
– Turbo Tuning — 50% off
– Överflöd Pipistrello (Super) — 40% off
– HSW Performance Upgrades — 50% off
– Eclipse Blvd Garage Property — 40% off
– Lampadati Furore GT (Sports) — 40% off
– And more

Check out the Rockstar Newswire for full details.
